symbols.CreateThread: Win32 direct call is not an Enma API; use documented Enma thread addon only where registered.
symbols.GetAsyncKeyState: Win32 direct call is not an Enma API; use documented Input or Win APIs.
symbols.aim_at_target: High-level aimbot helper hallucination; not in the Perception API index. Build only authorized educational examples from documented primitives.
symbols.asIScriptContext: AngelScript SDK surface is outside this toolkit scope; use Enma.
symbols.draw_box: Invented overlay helper; use documented render primitives such as draw_rect and draw_text.
symbols.draw_esp: Invented helper; use source-backed render APIs such as draw_text/draw_rect.
symbols.draw_line_3d: Invented 3D helper; project camera math must be supplied and validated before using 2D render primitives.
symbols.get_entity_list: Common game-specific helper hallucination; not in the Perception API index. Resolve entities from documented Proc APIs plus verified offsets.
symbols.get_local_player: Game-specific helper; not in Perception Enma API index.
symbols.get_module_base: Use documented Proc module APIs from the source-backed API index instead of generic cheat helper names.
symbols.get_players: Game-specific entity helper; resolve entities from documented Proc APIs plus verified offsets.
symbols.lua_getglobal: Lua is outside this toolkit scope; use Enma.
symbols.lua_pcall: Lua is outside pcx-ai-toolkit scope; use Enma or AngelScript only.
symbols.read_memory: Use documented Proc read APIs with verified process handles and offsets; do not invent generic helpers.
symbols.read_view_angles: Common cheat-helper hallucination; not in the Perception API index. Use documented Proc/System APIs and verified offsets instead.
symbols.world_to_screen: Common overlay helper hallucination; not in the Perception API index. Use documented render/math APIs and project-specific camera data.
symbols.write_memory: Use documented Proc write APIs only with authorization and verified offsets.
symbols.write_view_angles: Common cheat-helper hallucination; not in the Perception API index. Use documented Proc APIs only with authorization and verified evidence.
